title: Tender Comforting Venezuelan Muscovado Sugar Casserole
description: A floral and comforting Venezuelan dish featuring muscovado sugar, suitable for plant-based diets. Inspired by traditional Venezuelan cuisine, this recipe is perfect for a cozy dinner with friends and family.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the muscovado sugar, coconut oil, oat milk, applesauce, cocoa powder, vanilla extract, salt, and ground nutmeg.
In a separate bowl, mix the cornstarch and chopped pecans. Add the rose petals and mix well.
Add the cornstarch mixture to the muscovado sugar mixture and mix until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a 9-inch (23cm) slate-tile baking dish and smooth the top.
Sprinkle additional chopped pecans on top, if desired.
Bake for 35 minutes, or until the casserole is set and the top is golden brown.
Let the casserole cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve warm or at room temperature, garnished with additional rose petals if desired.
